data.title: 国际服总力战 Hieronymus（Indoor）1 Extreme难度更新
data.summary: [Total Assault Preview] New Total Assault - Hieronymus (Indoor Warfare) will begin on 1/25 (Tue) wit
data.body:
[Total Assault Preview]

New Total Assault - Hieronymus (Indoor Warfare) will begin on 1/25 (Tue) with a new difficulty: Extreme!
Be well prepared for the new strong boss and a new difficulty!

http://discord.com/invite/bluearchiveglobal
#BlueArchive
